calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-16-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales/Ericka Larnauti, CSR: Carl Sauceda.
Jonathan Bornstein, Esq., for Plaintiff: Jackie Tom, present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Imhotep Brown.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1316 Hayes St., San Francisco.
Rental Agreement/Lease declared forfeited.
Rent/Damages $5,597.00
Costs $330.00 for a total of $5,927.00
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-16-2007 Assigned To Trial Court
